name: yii2-ajaxcrud-bs5-advanced
description: Dev tooling only. The composer package ships src/ ; npm is used to build .min.js twins and run unit tests.

scripts.build: terser src/assets/ModalRemoteWithPassword.js -c -m -o src/assets/ModalRemoteWithPassword.min.js && terser src/assets/ajaxcrud.js -c -m -o src/assets/ajaxcrud.min.js && terser src/assets/ModalRemote.js -c -m -o src/assets/ModalRemote.min.js && terser src/assets/ModalStack.js -c -m -o src/assets/ModalStack.min.js
